acceptanceFocus: Dynamic and mutable React lists in the issue scope use stable domain IDs or immutable generated local row IDs instead of array index keys.
CuratedModelCatalog surfaces post-service route creation failure as user-visible deploy feedback instead of console.warn-only logging.
ApprovalModeToggle implements standard radiogroup keyboard behavior for arrow keys, Home, and End while preserving pointer behavior.
Hardcoded colors are migrated incrementally in touched issue files to existing or newly named CSS variables, with visual/e2e verification.
Static markdown or render-only index keys outside the issue scope are not expanded into this work.
